headline: CEO Stock Sale Tests Confidence In TJX Buybacks And Growth Story
summary: TJX Companies CEO Ernie Herrman recently sold 30,000 shares of NYSE:TJX, according to a regulatory filing. The transaction adds to a pattern of insider share sales at the company over the past year. There have been no insider share purchases reported over the same period. The sale comes as TJX Companies trades around $159.33 per share, with the stock up 35.2% over the past year and 123.3% over the past three years. Those returns place NYSE:TJX among the stronger performers in the retail...

headline: Jim Cramer on Kohl’s Corporation: “It Could Be the Beginning of a Rebuild That’s Worth Watching”
summary: Kohl’s Corporation (NYSE:KSS) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s game plan. Cramer highlighted the company’s new management, as he remarked: Tuesday morning, we get results from Kohl’s, and this earnings season’s been kind to almost all the retailers. Kohl’s, with new management, will most likely be treated well. I like to buy inexpensive […]

headline: Why The TJX Companies (TJX) Story Is Shifting With New Guidance And Buybacks
summary: TJX Companies just saw its fair value price target move from US$164.11 to US$171.78, a shift that updates how some analysts are framing upside in the name. That change lines up with recent commentary where most price targets cluster slightly higher, reflecting confidence in execution while still acknowledging a few more cautious views tied to macro sensitivity and already strong expectations. As you read on, you will see how these evolving calls fit together and what to watch next in the TJX...
